AI at Work — Daily Digest
Generated 2026-03-14 12:41 UTC
==================================================

1. MyNextBrowser
   https://www.producthunt.com/products/mynextbrowser
   → MyNextBrowser enables automating browser workflows for increased productivity.

2. Agentic AI: Workflows vs. Agents
   https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qd6anWv0mv0
   → Agentic AI explores the distinction between workflows and agents in automation.

3. Elon Musk pushes out more xAI founders as AI coding effort falters
   https://www.ft.com/content/e5fbc6c2-d5a6-4b97-a105-6a96ea849de5
   → Elon Musk's departure highlights challenges in AI coding projects.

4. Palantir software demos and DOD records show how the military may be using AI chatbots, including the kinds of queries and the data used to generate responses (Caroline Haskins/Wired)
   http://www.techmeme.com/260314/p3#a260314p3
   → Palantir reveals military use of AI chatbots with insights into query types and data usage.

5. Document poisoning in RAG systems: How attackers corrupt AI's sources
   https://aminrj.com/posts/rag-document-poisoning/
   → Document poisoning threats to AI systems necessitate robust security measures.

6. volcengine/OpenViking
   https://github.com/volcengine/OpenViking
   → OpenViking provides an open-source context database for AI agents' management needs.

7. p-e-w/heretic
   https://github.com/p-e-w/heretic
   → p-e-w/heretic offers fully automatic censorship removal solutions.

8. Show HN: One MCP server that gives your AI agent access to 25,000 tools
   https://nerq.ai/gateway
   → Show HN introduces a server offering access to thousands of tools for AI agents.

9. Security Considerations for Artificial Intelligence Agents
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.12230v1
   → Security Considerations for Artificial Intelligence Agents addresses critical security aspects of AI agents.

10. CLASP: Defending Hybrid Large Language Models Against Hidden State Poisoning Attacks
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.12206v1
   → CLASP discusses defending hybrid LLMs against hidden state poisoning attacks.
